title: asplenium subintegrifolium
intro: Asplenium subintegrifolium, also known as the glossy wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Asplenium subintegrifolium include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
